name: spaitial-ai
description: SpAItial plugins for Claude — generate, manage, and export explorable 3D Gaussian-splat worlds via the hosted SpAItial MCP server.

plugins.name: spaitial-worlds
plugins.description: Generate explorable 3D Gaussian-splat worlds from a text prompt, image, or 360 panorama using the SpAItial MCP server — then download splats, export meshes, manage your library, and preview them in a built-in PlayCanvas viewer.
